meta.title: Meme Chat AI | Funny AI chat app for replies that hit
meta.description: Meme Chat AI is a funny AI chat app that fixes dry texts, explains confusing stuff fast, roasts half-baked ideas usefully, and turns brain soup into replies, captions, and plans.
meta.keywords: meme AI chat, funny AI assistant, AI text rewriter, AI chat app, meme chatbot, iPhone AI chat
meta.ogDescription: A funny AI chat app that fixes dry texts, explains confusing stuff, roasts ideas usefully, and turns brain soup into replies, captions, and plans.

hero.h1: Say the thing without sounding like an NPC.
hero.lead: Brainrot Bot fixes dry texts, explains confusing stuff without the textbook fog, roasts half-baked ideas usefully, and turns brain soup into replies, captions, plans, and actual lore.

phone.agent1: "i'm down" works. "i'm in, send the plan before i regain common sense" has actual pulse.
phone.agent2: you're not doomed. the plan just needs one clean next step. lore contained.

status.s2: Now live on the App Store

what.h2: For brain soup that needs better packaging.
what.p: Meme Chat AI is what you open when your message is dry, your idea is half-baked, or your brain is off doing side quests. It helps you get clearer words without losing personality, no enterprise dashboard energy required.
what.card1Body: Turn dry texts into messages with a pulse, not something assembled in a spreadsheet.
what.card2Body: Get honest feedback on your ideas without getting emotionally dropkicked.
what.card3Body: For when you need the answer, not a textbook doing parkour at 2am.
what.card4Body: Captions, prompts, plans, and day recaps that are no longer fighting for their lives.

prompts.h2: Open chat, pick a vibe, keep moving.
prompts.p2: am i cooked or can this be fixed?
prompts.p3: give me the lore in 5 lines
prompts.p4: roast this idea, then save it
prompts.p5: turn my brain soup into a text
prompts.p6: help me lock in for 30 minutes

rot.h2: Dial the brainrot up or down.
rot.p: Rot Level sets how unhinged Brainrot Bot gets, from lightly spiced to full goblin mode. The useful answer stays underneath; you just pick the energy. Switch it anytime, mid-chat.
rot.card1Body: Mostly business, lightly meme'd. Still won't read like a default corporate assistant.
rot.card2Body: Full Brainrot Bot energy: jokes and slang the whole way, but it still gets you there.
rot.card3Body: Maximum brainrot. Cursed metaphors and dramatic overreactions — still useful, just feral about it.

meme.h2: When words fail, send the meme.
meme.p: Mid-chat, pull up a strip of trending memes or search for the exact reaction, then drop it straight into the convo. Some moments deserve a face, not a paragraph.

memory.h2: Brainrot Bot that actually knows you.
memory.p1: On paid plans, Brainrot Bot picks up on your vibe, the people you mention, and the things you keep bringing up. The next chat picks up where the last one left off. No re-explaining, no starting from zero.
memory.p2: You stay in control. Flip memory off or wipe it from Settings any time, no questions asked.
memory.card1Body: Notes your vibe, your people, and the topics you keep returning to, so it skips the re-intro every session.
memory.card2Body: Tied to your account, not your device. Same memory every sign-in.
memory.card3Body: Turn it off or wipe it from Settings. It stops immediately, no waiting.
memory.card4Body: Available on Sidekick, Wingman, and MVP. Free plan gets the full bot, just not the memory.

plans.h2: Plans that match how hard you chat.
plans.p: Same smart Brainrot Bot on every plan. The tiers set your monthly allowance, whether Brainrot Bot remembers you, and whether you can restyle the chat. Wingman is the popular pick; MVP is the most powerful.
plans.plan4Desc: For heavy chat days and professional yapping.

iosCallout.h2: Meme Chat AI is live on the App Store.
iosCallout.p: Grab it on iPhone, open a chat, and put Brainrot Bot to work on your dry texts, half-baked ideas, and brain soup. Free to start, with meme-power plans when you want more.

faq.q1: Is this for business chat agents?
faq.a1: Not right now. Meme Chat AI is a personal AI chat app for humor, writing help, explanations, and getting your ideas un-cooked.
faq.a2: Yes. Meme Chat AI is live on the App Store. Download it on iPhone and start chatting. Free to start, with meme-power plans when you want more chats and memory.
faq.q3: Does the website use real app assets?
faq.a3: Yes. The homepage uses the app icon, Brainrot Bot avatar images, Poppins, Fredoka, and the same brand colors as the app.

meta.title: Download Meme Chat AI for iPhone | App Store
meta.description: Meme Chat AI is live on the App Store. Download the funny AI chat app for iPhone and start chatting with Brainrot Bot for free.
meta.ogDescription: Meme Chat AI is live on the App Store. Download the funny AI chat app for iPhone and start chatting with Brainrot Bot.

body.h1: Get Meme Chat AI for iPhone.
body.lead: Meme Chat AI is live on the App Store. Download it, open a chat, and let Brainrot Bot fix your dry texts, explain the confusing stuff, and turn brain soup into replies, captions, and plans.
body.li1: Free to start — meme-power plans unlock more chats and memory.
body.li2: Built for iPhone, with app themes on every paid plan.
body.li3: Your account and subscription controls live in the app.

body.intro: Need a hand with Meme Chat AI? Email memechataisupport@gmail.com and we'll get back to you. Include your device model, OS version, and a short description of what you're seeing — that's usually enough to track anything down.
body.li1: Delete my account. Open the App, go to Settings → Delete all data. Your account, profile on our servers, and every preference on your device are wiped immediately.
body.li3: Forgot your password. On the sign-in screen, tap the email field, then use the password reset link sent by Meme Chat AI to set a new one.
